---
title: "test_heimdall_shield_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_heimdall_shield_empire.py"
loc: 57
complexity: 6
logic_score: 7.30
style_score: 4.03
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.16
---

## Intent
The `test_heimdall_shield_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on shield, test_safe_commands, test_destructive_rm, test_destructive_git, test_destructive_filesystem, test_remote_shell_execution. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via shield, test_safe_commands, test_destructive_rm, test_destructive_git, test_destructive_filesystem, test_remote_shell_execution. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.engine.heimdall_shield](file://src.core.engine.heimdall_shield)

### Exports
- `shield`
- `test_safe_commands`
- `test_destructive_rm`
- `test_destructive_git`
- `test_destructive_filesystem`
- `test_remote_shell_execution`
